name: Documentary
description: News / documentary — restrained, factual, sans-serif, single accent
use_for: explainers, factual reporting, data stories, journalistic content

dominant.role: clean white backdrop, large negative space

accent.role: single emphasis tag, breaking-news bar, stat callout

flux.positive_prefix: Documentary-style photograph, neutral lighting, single subject in clean composition, journalistic, observational, restrained color palette, looks like a still from a New York Times feature.
flux.positive_suffix: Photojournalistic, NOT staged, NOT overproduced, observational distance.

always_add: neutral background, no obvious set design
